name: 有机化学官能团与命名
subject: chemistry
domain_name: 结构 3 · 周期表与分类 Structure 3 · Classification of Matter
curriculum_points: Identify and name organic compounds containing up to six carbon atoms and one or more of the following functional groups: alkene, alkyne, halogenoalkane, alcohol, aldehyde, ketone, carboxylic acid, ester, amine, nitrile, amide, and arene, using IUPAC nomenclature (AO1).
Deduce structural formulas and apply IUPAC rules to name isomers of non-cyclic organic compounds containing up to six carbon atoms and one or more functional groups (AO2).

interactive_resources.pdb_hint: 搜索 RCSB PDB 数据库获取分子 ID，常见: H2O=1H2O, NaCl=1NAC, C2H5OH=1EHT
interactive_resources.description: 3Dmol.js 化学分子三维结构展示
GeoGebra 化学计量比可视化
